segments.speaker: JANE
segments.en: Hello, Jane Fairbanks speaking.
segments.zh: 你好，我是简·费尔班克斯。

segments.speaker: FRANK
segments.en: Oh, good morning.
segments.zh: 哦，早上好。我叫弗兰克·普里查德。我刚退休搬到索索。我想当志愿者，听说你在村里协调志愿工作。

segments.speaker: FRANK
segments.en: My name's Frank Pritchard.

segments.speaker: FRANK
segments.en: I've just retired and moved to Southoe.

segments.speaker: FRANK
segments.en: I'd like to become a volunteer, and I gather you co-ordinate voluntary work in the village.

segments.speaker: JANE
segments.en: That's right.
segments.zh: 没错。

segments.speaker: FRANK
segments.en: What sort of thing could I do?
segments.zh: 我能做些什么呢？

segments.speaker: JANE
segments.en: Well, we need help with the village library.
segments.zh: 嗯，村里的图书馆需要帮忙。我们从镇图书馆借书，个人也会捐书。所以你可以帮忙收集这些书——如果你有车的话。

segments.speaker: JANE
segments.en: We borrow books from the town library, and individuals also donate them.

segments.speaker: JANE
segments.en: So, one thing you could do is get involved in collecting them – if you've got a car, that is.

segments.speaker: FRANK
segments.en: Yes, that's no problem.
segments.zh: 没问题。

segments.speaker: JANE
segments.en: The times are pretty flexible so we can arrange it to suit you.
segments.zh: 时间很灵活，我们可以根据你的情况安排。另外，我们还要记录收到的书、借来的书以及需要归还给镇图书馆的书。多一个人帮忙更新记录会很有帮助。

segments.speaker: JANE
segments.en: Another thing is the records that we keep of the books we're given, and those we borrow and need to return to the town library.

segments.speaker: JANE
segments.en: It would be very useful to have another person to help keep them up to date.

segments.speaker: FRANK
segments.en: Right.
segments.zh: 好的。我习惯用电脑工作——这些记录是电脑化的吧？

segments.speaker: FRANK
segments.en: I'm used to working on a computer – I presume they're computerised?

segments.speaker: JANE
segments.en: Oh yes.
segments.zh: 哦，是的。

segments.speaker: FRANK
segments.en: Is the library purpose-built?
segments.zh: 图书馆是专门建的吗？我在村里散步时没注意到。

segments.speaker: FRANK
segments.en: I haven't noticed it when I've walked round the village.

segments.speaker: JANE
segments.en: No, we simply have the use of a room in the village hall, the West Room.
segments.zh: 不是，我们只是用村礼堂的一个房间，西厅。进门左手边就是。

segments.speaker: JANE
segments.en: It's on the left as you go in.

segments.speaker: FRANK
segments.en: I must go and have a look inside the hall.
segments.zh: 我得进去看看那个礼堂。

segments.speaker: JANE
segments.en: Yes, it's a nice building.
segments.zh: 是啊，那栋楼挺漂亮的。

segments.speaker: FRANK
segments.en: Do you run a lunch club in the village for elderly people?
segments.zh: 你们村里有没有为老年人办的午餐俱乐部？我知道很多地方都有。

segments.speaker: FRANK
segments.en: I know a lot of places do.

segments.speaker: JANE
segments.en: Yes, we have a very successful club.
segments.zh: 有，我们有一个很成功的俱乐部。

segments.speaker: FRANK
segments.en: I could help with transport, if that's of any use.
segments.zh: 如果你们需要的话，我可以帮忙提供交通。

segments.speaker: JANE
segments.en: Ooo definitely.
segments.zh: 哦，当然。人们从邻村来我们俱乐部，我们一直需要更多的司机。

segments.speaker: JANE
segments.en: People come to the club from neighbouring villages, and we're always in need of more drivers.

segments.speaker: FRANK
segments.en: And does the club have groups that focus on a particular hobby, too?
segments.zh: 那俱乐部有没有专注于某个爱好的小组？我可以参加一两个，尤其是有艺术小组的话。

segments.speaker: FRANK
segments.en: I could get involved in one or two, particularly if there are any art groups.

segments.speaker: JANE
segments.en: Excellent.
segments.zh: 太好了。我会看看哪里需要帮助，然后回复你。

segments.speaker: JANE
segments.en: I'll find out where we need help and get back to you.

segments.speaker: FRANK
segments.en: Fine.
segments.zh: 好的。那对个别居民的帮助呢？你们安排吗？

segments.speaker: FRANK
segments.en: What about help for individual residents.

segments.speaker: FRANK
segments.en: Do you arrange that at all?

segments.speaker: JANE
segments.en: Yes, we do it as a one-off.
segments.zh: 是的，我们做一次性帮助。事实上，有一位卡罗尔太太，她下周需要搭车去医院，我们正发愁找不到人。

segments.speaker: JANE
segments.en: In fact, there's Mrs Carroll.

segments.speaker: JANE
segments.en: She needs a lift to the hospital next week, and we're struggling to find someone.

segments.speaker: FRANK
segments.en: When's her appointment?
segments.zh: 她的预约是什么时候？

segments.speaker: JANE
segments.en: On Tuesday.
segments.zh: 周二。需要整个上午的时间。

segments.speaker: JANE
segments.en: It would take the whole morning.

segments.speaker: FRANK
segments.en: I could do that.
segments.zh: 我可以去。

segments.speaker: JANE
segments.en: Oh, that would be great.
segments.zh: 哦，那太好了，谢谢你。还有，下周我们打算在塞尔兹伯里先生搬来之前给他家做些修缮，因为他身体不太好，没法自己动手。我们已经找了人装修他的厨房，但如果你能帮他花园除除草，那就太棒了。

segments.speaker: JANE
segments.en: Thank you.

segments.speaker: JANE
segments.en: And also, next week, we're arranging to have some work done to Mr Selsbury's house before he moves, as he isn't healthy enough to do it himself.

segments.speaker: JANE
segments.en: We've got some people to decorate his kitchen, but if you could do some weeding in his garden, that would be wonderful.

segments.speaker: FRANK
segments.en: OK.
segments.zh: 好的，我很乐意。而且时间应该很灵活吧。

segments.speaker: FRANK
segments.en: I'd enjoy that.

segments.speaker: FRANK
segments.en: And presumably the day and time are flexible.

segments.speaker: JANE
segments.en: Oh yes.
segments.zh: 是的，你只要说什么时候最方便，我们会告诉塞尔兹伯里先生的。

segments.speaker: JANE
segments.en: Just say when would suit you best, and we'll let Mr Selsbury know.

segments.speaker: FRANK
segments.en: Good.
segments.zh: 好的。

segments.speaker: JANE
segments.en: The volunteers group also organises monthly social events, which is a great way to meet other people, of course.
segments.zh: 志愿者小组每月还会组织社交活动，这当然是认识其他人的好机会。

segments.speaker: FRANK
segments.en: Uhuh.
segments.zh: 嗯。

segments.speaker: JANE
segments.en: So next month, on the 19th of October, we're holding a quiz – a couple of residents are great at planning unusual ones, and we always fill the village hall.
segments.zh: 所以下个月，也就是10月19号，我们会举办一场智力竞赛——有几位居民很擅长策划一些不寻常的题目，每次都能把村礼堂坐满。

segments.speaker: FRANK
segments.en: That sounds like fun.
segments.zh: 听起来很有趣。我能帮忙做点什么吗？

segments.speaker: FRANK
segments.en: Can I do anything to help?

segments.speaker: JANE
segments.en: Well, because of the number of people, we need plenty of refreshments for halfway through.
segments.zh: 嗯，因为人数多，我们需要中途提供足够的点心。所以如果你能提供一些，我们会很感激。

segments.speaker: JANE
segments.en: So, if you could provide any, we'd be grateful.

segments.speaker: FRANK
segments.en: I'm sure I could.
segments.zh: 我想我可以。我会想想做什么，然后告诉你。

segments.speaker: FRANK
segments.en: I'll think about what to make, and let you know.

segments.speaker: JANE
segments.en: Thank you.
segments.zh: 谢谢。然后在11月18日，我们会在村礼堂举办一场舞会。我们已经预订了一支专门演奏20世纪30年代音乐的乐队——他们以前来过，很多人要求我们请他们回来。

segments.speaker: JANE
segments.en: Then on November the 18th, we're holding a dance, also in the village hall.

segments.speaker: JANE
segments.en: We've booked a band that specialises in music of the 1930s – they've been before, and we've had a lot of requests to bring them back.

segments.speaker: FRANK
segments.en: I'm not really a dancer, but I'd like to do something to help.
segments.zh: 我不太会跳舞，但我想帮忙做点事。

segments.speaker: JANE
segments.en: Well, we sell tickets in advance, and having an extra person to check them at the door, as people arrive, would be good – it can be quite a bottleneck if everyone arrives at once!
segments.zh: 嗯，我们提前售票，如果多一个人在门口检票，会很好——如果大家都同时到达，可能会很拥挤！

segments.speaker: FRANK
segments.en: OK, I'm happy with that.
segments.zh: 好的，我很乐意。

segments.speaker: JANE
segments.en: We're also arranging a New Year's Eve party.
segments.zh: 我们还在安排一个新年夜派对。我们预计那会是一个很大的活动，所以不在村礼堂，而是在蒙特福特酒店举行。

segments.speaker: JANE
segments.en: We're expecting that to be a really big event, so instead of the village hall, it'll be held in the Mountfort Hotel.

segments.speaker: FRANK
segments.en: The ...?
segments.zh: 哪个酒店？

segments.speaker: JANE
segments.en: Mountfort.
segments.zh: Mountfort。M-O-U-N-T-F-O-R-T 酒店。不在 Southoe 本地，但也就几英里远。酒店会提供晚餐，我们还预订了一支乐队。唯一还没搞定的是海报。这活儿你碰巧能接吗？

segments.speaker: JANE
segments.en: M-O-U-N-T-F-O-R-T Hotel.

segments.speaker: JANE
segments.en: It isn't in Southoe itself, but it's only a couple of miles away.

segments.speaker: JANE
segments.en: The hotel will be providing dinner and we've booked a band.

segments.speaker: JANE
segments.en: The one thing we haven't got yet is a poster.

segments.speaker: JANE
segments.en: That isn't something you could do, by any chance, is it?

segments.speaker: FRANK
segments.en: Well actually, yes.
segments.zh: 嗯，还真能。退休前我是平面设计师，这正好是我的专长。

segments.speaker: FRANK
segments.en: Before I retired I was a graphic designer, so that's right up my street.

segments.speaker: JANE
segments.en: Oh perfect!
segments.zh: 太棒了！我把细节给你，然后你发个初稿给我……

segments.speaker: JANE
segments.en: I'll give you the details, and then perhaps you could send me a draft ...

segments.speaker: FRANK
segments.en: Of course.
segments.zh: 没问题。

items.prompt: Help with books (times to be arranged)

pairs.note: 题干中的'books'被替换为'village library'，意思相同。
题干中的'times to be arranged'暗示活动时间灵活，原文'get involved in'表示参与，时间可协调。
题干中的'Help with books'具体化为'collecting them'，即收集书籍。

paraphrase.explain: 定位句提到'help with the village library'和'collecting them'，与题干'Help with books'对应，且'get involved in'暗示时间可安排，从而定位到答案'collecting'。

items.prompt: Help needed to keep of books up to date

pairs.q: keep of books up to date
pairs.note: 题干中的'keep of books up to date'被替换为'keep them up to date'，其中'them'指代前文的'records'。
题干中的'books'在原文中对应'records'，因为这里指的是图书的借阅记录。

paraphrase.explain: 定位句提到'records that we keep of the books'，然后说'help keep them up to date'，其中'them'指'records'，所以答案就是'records'。

items.prompt: Library is in the Room in the village hall

pairs.note: 原文直接说West Room，题干说Library，但实际指同一个房间，需要听出West Room就是图书馆所在房间。
题干中的Room在原文中被具体化为West Room，注意专有名词。

paraphrase.explain: 定位句提到'the West Room'，直接对应题干中的'Room'，而'Library'就是该房间的功能，因此答案就是West。

pairs.note: 题干'Help by providing'被替换为原文'help with'，意思相同，但结构不同。
题干关键词'transport'在原文中完全一致，直接定位。

paraphrase.explain: 题干中的'Help by providing'对应原文的'help with'，而'transport'完全一致，因此可以快速定位到答案。

pairs.note: hobbies 和 hobby 是单复数变化，意思相同。
such as 表示举例，原文用 particularly if there are any 引出具体例子，功能相同。
题干和原文都出现 art，直接对应。

paraphrase.explain: 题干问帮助培养爱好，比如什么。原文中说话人提到想参与一些爱好小组，特别是有艺术小组的话，因此 art 就是答案。

pairs.note: 题干'Taking...to'对应原文'a lift to'，表示送某人去某地。
人名完全一致，直接定位。

paraphrase.explain: 通过人名Mrs Carroll定位到原文，再找到'a lift to the hospital'，其中'the hospital'就是答案。

items.prompt: Work in the at Mr Selsbury's house

pairs.note: 题干说'在...工作'，原文具体化为'在他的花园里除草'，'work'被替换为'do some weeding'。
题干说'在Mr Selsbury的房子'，原文说'在他的花园'，地点具体化，但'garden'是房子的一部分。

paraphrase.explain: 定位句提到'do some weeding in his garden'，其中'his garden'对应题干中的'Mr Selsbury's house'，'do some weeding'对应'work'，因此答案应为'garden'。

pairs.note: 日期格式不同，但意思完全一样。
原文直接说'holding a quiz'，所以'quiz'就是活动。

paraphrase.explain: 题干问10月19日的活动，原文提到'19th of October'和'holding a quiz'，直接对应。

pairs.note: 原文中'check them'的'check'与题干'checking'是同一动词的不同形式。

paraphrase.explain: 题干'checking'对应原文中'check them'的'check'，表示检票动作。

pairs.note: 题干中的'designing the'与原文中的'poster'直接对应，表示设计海报。

paraphrase.explain: 根据题干'designing the'，在原文中寻找与设计相关的名词，定位到'poster'，即答案。
